overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through an urban memorial park at sunset. The scene transitions from a plaza with a large eagle statue and modern glass buildings, through stone memorial walls, to a waterfront promenade with the Statue of Liberty visible in the distance.

events.description: Spider-Man stops walking and looks up at birds flying overhead against the sunset sky
resumes walking away from the eagle statue toward the memorial area

agents.ego_description: circling the eagle statue, looking up at birds flying overhead, then walking toward the memorial area

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing standing near the eagle statue looking at his phone

entered.detail: large dark bronze eagle sculpture with outstretched wings on a stone pedestal
tall curved skyscraper with reflective blue-green glass facade and illuminated windows
wet reflective stone pavement reflecting the sunset and surrounding buildings
trees with orange and green autumn foliage surrounding the plaza

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man explores an urban plaza at sunset, circling a large eagle monument while a modern glass tower rises in the background. The wet pavement reflects the warm golden light as a few pedestrians stand nearby, and birds fly overhead against the colorful sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial entrance with inscribed stone walls

events.description: entering the memorial area with tall stone walls inscribed with text
sunset light creates dramatic orange reflections on the wet stone surfaces between the memorial walls

agents.ego_description: walking between the stone memorial walls, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: man in dark sweater walking past while looking at his phone

entered.detail: tall gray stone slab with engraved inscriptions listing names

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters a memorial area defined by tall stone walls with inscriptions. The camera moves between these monuments as the sunset creates warm reflections on the wet ground. Pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction while the modern glass tower remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial corridor with multiple stone monuments

events.description: approaching the exit of the memorial corridor toward the open waterfront

agents.ego_description: weaving between multiple stone memorial walls as long shadows stretch across the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a bench near the memorial wall

entered.detail: distant view of water and horizon visible between the memorial walls

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues through the memorial corridor, now surrounded by multiple stone walls on all sides. The sunset creates dramatic backlighting and long shadows. The view opens toward the waterfront in the distance as the urban buildings fade from view.

events.description: exiting the memorial onto the open waterfront promenade with unobstructed water views
Statue of Liberty becomes clearly visible in the distance across the harbor as the sun sets

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade toward the Statue of Liberty as the sky displays vibrant sunset colors

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
distant green statue on an island visible across the harbor against the sunset
ornate black street lamps lining the waterfront path
calm water reflecting the orange and purple sunset colors

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man emerges onto an open waterfront promenade as the sun sets over the harbor. The Statue of Liberty stands visible in the distance across the water. The promenade is lined with lamps and benches, with pedestrians walking along the path as the sky displays vibrant orange and purple hues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a city memorial park that transitions from a modern urban plaza to an open waterfront promenade at sunset. It begins by circling a large eagle monument beneath a towering glass skyscraper, where the wet pavement reflects the warm golden light of the sky. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza shifts into a memorial corridor defined by tall, inscribed stone walls that cast long shadows and create dramatic backlighting. The scene then expands as the urban buildings fade from view, guiding the way through the stone monuments toward a brightening horizon. Finally, the path opens onto a wide harbor promenade lined with lamps and benches, revealing the Statue of Liberty in the distance under a vibrant orange and purple sky.
